workload.name: AppLens-Tune local report summarization and eval sweeps

findings.evidence: GTX 1660 SUPER with 6 GB VRAM; CUDA available; llama.cpp CUDA-MMQ measured best.
findings.guidance: Use quantized inference and benchmark-backed eval sweeps. Avoid large local fine-tunes.
findings.verification: Run llama.cpp health, chat completion, and benchmark smoke before using the endpoint.

findings.evidence: PyTorch CUDA smoke passes, but VRAM is limited.
findings.guidance: Training requires a tiny target, manifest, stop conditions, and user approval.
findings.verification: Confirm manifest, output directory, max runtime, and OOM abort behavior before training.

policy_notes: Do not alter services, startup entries, drivers, firewall, or model caches.
Use cached models unless downloads are approved.
